text.text: Your Transmute has its own constraints. Don’t assume bigger is better.
The Transmute accepts only certain stones for its foundation—glass is forbidden. The sanctioned blocks will be revealed across the next few pages. Also, keep it rectangular.
The max size of your transmute is 16x16x65 external. or 14x14x64 internal.
The transmute must have corners, edges and ceiling in order to function correctly.
